rulings.Case Title: THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON VS. DOREEN SANDRA HAVEA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 3, 2019 line 5. DEFENDANT DOREEN AFUHAAMANGO DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR. Insufficient notice per California Code of Civil Procedure sections 1005(b) and 1013. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: HAPPY 42ND AVE PARTNERS LLC VS. JODY TELLIER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 3, 2019 line 6. DEFENDANT JODY TELLIER Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons is DENIED. Plaintiff has made the requisite showing that service was effectuated. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION VS. DEBORAH MCDONALD ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 3, 2019 line 7. DEFENDANT DEBORAH MCDONALD DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED. Plaintiff alleges sufficient facts to demonstrate that Tyesha McDonald was under Defendant's control. Plaintiff's Complaint is certain in that Plaintiff seeks to evict Defendant pursuant to CCP § 1161(4), Housing Assistance Payments Contract Section 8 Project Based Voucher Program Tenancy Addendum Paragraph 8, and Lease Covenant 31. =(501/CFH)
